title: 蚂蚁测试AI支付宝 嵌入"阿宝"助手
full_text:
X.PIN on X: "An AI-powered Alipay is being tested by Ant Group. This is Alibaba's first attempt to plug AI into China's biggest payments platform. The new Alipay will embed an AI assistant called "Abao," shifting the interface from "function menus + search bar" to conversation-first. https://t.co/Fx1FLZirc6" / X

An AI-powered Alipay is being tested by Ant Group. This is Alibaba's first attempt to plug AI into China's biggest payments platform. The new Alipay will embed an AI assistant called "Abao," shifting the interface from "function menus + search bar" to conversation-first.

discovery_record.discovery_title: 蚂蚁测试AI支付宝 嵌入"阿宝"助手
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 蚂蚁集团正在测试一款 AI 驱动的支付宝。这是阿里巴巴首次尝试将 AI 植入中国最大的支付平台。新版支付宝将嵌入一个名为"阿宝"的 AI 助手，界面从"功能菜单+搜索栏"转变为对话优先。

key_excerpts.text: 蚂蚁集团正在测试一款 AI 驱动的支付宝。这是阿里巴巴首次尝试将 AI 植入中国最大的支付平台。新版支付宝将嵌入一个名为"阿宝"的 AI 助手，界面从"功能菜单+搜索栏"转变为对话优先。
